# P-E-001 — Direct sanctioned-entity exposure

> Exposition directe à une entité sanctionnée

## Description (EN)

Supplier or direct shareholder appears on an international sanctions roster.

## Description (FR)

Le fournisseur ou un actionnaire direct figure sur une liste de sanctions internationales.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Direct sanctioned exposure — supplier OR a direct shareholder appears on World Bank / AfDB / EU / OFAC / UN / OpenSanctions rolls.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.55 + weight 0.95 — sanctions hits are near-conclusive when the entity-resolver confidence is high.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Same-name-different-entity** mitigated by RCCM/NIU verification.

## Production wiring

✅ Production-ready. Reads the sanctions-adapter chain output.
